objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access for nacelle service, tilt-axis alignment, servo linkage adjustment, battery CG tuning, ESC/motor wiring, and payload bay swaps.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if tilt-axis datums, nacelle replacement, battery slide access, or wiring inspection are blocked.

constraint: wing keys and spar sockets remain externally inspectable

trade_off.gain: removes repeated wing-root alignment setup and improves visible datum control
trade_off.guardrail: wing keys and spar sockets remain externally inspectable
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if tilt-axis datums, nacelle replacement, battery slide access, or wiring inspection are blocked.

decision.rationale: integrate fuselage spine with wing-root spar sockets

verification.check: wing keys and spar sockets remain externally inspectable

evolution.leaves_for_next: wing keys and spar sockets remain externally inspectable | mit: Keep nacelles as removable service pods with access lids.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access for nacelle service, tilt-axis alignment, servo linkage adjustment, battery CG tuning, ESC/motor wiring, and payload bay swaps.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if tilt-axis datums, nacelle replacement, battery slide access, or wiring inspection are blocked.

constraint: nacelle can be removed without opening fuselage

trade_off.gain: protects motor/ESC and tilt-axis service access
trade_off.guardrail: nacelle can be removed without opening fuselage
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if tilt-axis datums, nacelle replacement, battery slide access, or wiring inspection are blocked.

decision.rationale: keep tilting nacelles as removable service pods

verification.check: nacelle can be removed without opening fuselage

evolution.leaves_for_next: nacelle can be removed without opening fuselage | mit: Expose datum pads and print nacelles with datum pads upward.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access for nacelle service, tilt-axis alignment, servo linkage adjustment, battery CG tuning, ESC/motor wiring, and payload bay swaps.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if tilt-axis datums, nacelle replacement, battery slide access, or wiring inspection are blocked.

constraint: linkage cartridge can be replaced and adjusted after wing installation

trade_off.gain: allows servo horn and linkage adjustment demonstration
trade_off.guardrail: linkage cartridge can be replaced and adjusted after wing installation
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if tilt-axis datums, nacelle replacement, battery slide access, or wiring inspection are blocked.

decision.rationale: keep tilt linkage as a separate cartridge

verification.check: linkage cartridge can be replaced and adjusted after wing installation

evolution.leaves_for_next: linkage cartridge can be replaced and adjusted after wing installation | mit: Use slide-in rail with visible CG marks and 0.35 mm clearance.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access for nacelle service, tilt-axis alignment, servo linkage adjustment, battery CG tuning, ESC/motor wiring, and payload bay swaps.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if tilt-axis datums, nacelle replacement, battery slide access, or wiring inspection are blocked.

constraint: battery dummy remains slide-in and CG positions remain visible

trade_off.gain: reduces loose trays and improves CG demonstration
trade_off.guardrail: battery dummy remains slide-in and CG positions remain visible
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if tilt-axis datums, nacelle replacement, battery slide access, or wiring inspection are blocked.

decision.rationale: integrate battery rail with visible cable guide and payload service label

verification.check: battery dummy remains slide-in and CG positions remain visible

evolution.leaves_for_next: battery dummy remains slide-in and CG positions remain visible | mit: Use open channel and inspection windows.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access for nacelle service, tilt-axis alignment, servo linkage adjustment, battery CG tuning, ESC/motor wiring, and payload bay swaps.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if tilt-axis datums, nacelle replacement, battery slide access, or wiring inspection are blocked.

constraint: tail hinge and gear mounts attach from outside

trade_off.gain: fragile handled parts can be replaced without sacrificing main fuselage
trade_off.guardrail: tail hinge and gear mounts attach from outside
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if tilt-axis datums, nacelle replacement, battery slide access, or wiring inspection are blocked.

decision.rationale: keep V-tail and landing gear replaceable

verification.check: tail hinge and gear mounts attach from outside

evolution.leaves_for_next: tail hinge and gear mounts attach from outside | mit: Print long axis on bed, keep spar socket faces upward, and test wing-key fit.
